product_overview: A deterministic position-size calculator and local trading journal for amateur crypto traders, with an AI-powered discipline evaluator (Gemini) to analyze saved trades.
core_goals: Provide a deterministic position size calculation using capital, risk percentage (max 5%), entry price, and stop loss.
Persist trade records locally in localStorage with a defined JSON object structure for review and status updates.
Prevent invalid inputs (division by zero, negative values) and hard-block risk percentages above 5%.
Offer an AI Risk Evaluator using Gemini via /api/roast to provide feedback on trading discipline.
Support reliable E2E testing using stable data-testid anchors and browser-based tests (Playwright/Cypress).

features.name: Position Calculation
features.description: Calculate maximum allowed position size from capital, risk percent, and price distance; validate inputs and enable saving to the journal.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> Fill Asset Pair (optional) -> Fill Capital -> Fill Risk Percentage -> Fill Entry Price -> Fill Stop Loss Price -> Click "Save to Journal" button -> See calculated Position Size -> See new entry saved in localStorage
Navigate to / -> Fill Capital -> Fill Risk Percentage -> Fill Entry Price -> Fill Stop Loss Price (same as Entry Price) -> See error message "Invalid price distance" -> Save button is disabled
Navigate to / -> Fill Capital -> Fill Risk Percentage (value > 5) -> See validation error "Risk must be 5% or less" -> Save button is disabled
Navigate to / -> Fill Capital (negative value) -> See validation error "Values must be non-negative" -> Save button is disabled

features.name: Trading Journal
features.description: Record, view, and manage trading history persisted in localStorage; update status to Won/Lost and remove entries.
user_flows: Navigate to /journal -> See list of journal entries loaded from localStorage -> Click data-testid="btn-won" on an entry to Mark trade as Won -> See entry status updated to 'Won' in the UI
Navigate to /journal -> See list of journal entries loaded from localStorage -> Click data-testid="btn-lost" on an entry to Mark trade as Lost -> See entry status updated to 'Lost' in the UI
Navigate to /journal -> See list of journal entries loaded from localStorage -> Click data-testid="btn-delete" on an entry -> See entry removed from list and removed from localStorage
Navigate to /journal -> See list of journal entries loaded from localStorage -> Click data-testid="btn-delete-all" -> See journal emptied and localStorage cleared
Navigate to /journal -> localStorage has been cleared externally -> Attempt to Click data-testid="btn-delete" for a previously visible entry -> See error message 'Entry not found' or no change to UI

features.name: AI Risk Evaluator
features.description: Send the journal to the Gemini-backed evaluator (POST /api/roast) and display AI feedback about trading discipline.
user_flows: Navigate to /journal -> Ensure journal has at least one entry in localStorage -> Click data-testid="btn-roast" (Evaluate My Journal) -> See button text change to 'Analyzing Discipline...' -> POST /api/roast is called -> See AI feedback message displayed in the UI
Navigate to /journal -> Ensure journal is empty -> See Evaluate button (data-testid="btn-roast") disabled

Navigate to /journal -> Ensure journal has entries -> Click data-testid="btn-roast" -> See button text change to 'Analyzing Discipline...' -> POST /api/roast returns an error -> See error message 'AI evaluation failed' and button returns to enabled state

routes.description: Trading Journal and AI Risk Evaluator

features.name: Position Calculation
features.description: Calculate allowed position size based on capital, risk percentage (max 5%), and price distance.

features.name: Trading Journal
features.description: Record, view, and manage trading history stored in localStorage.

features.name: AI Risk Evaluator
features.description: Get AI-powered feedback on trading history using Gemini.

known_limitations.impact: Data is lost if browser cache/localStorage is cleared.
